name: sikong-monorepo
comment:workspaces: apps/sikong-web is intentionally outside the workspace — it's a separately-deployed site that links the sibling semajsx repo via a file: dependency, which isn't present in CI. It builds/deploys standalone (see apps/sikong-web).

scripts.release:check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && git diff --check && cd packages/sikong && npm publish --dry-run
